content.en:
Airplanes!!!!!

Pieces of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragments were taken out by Ye Tian, and any fragment here was enough to make those Supreme Dao Realms go crazy, and even fight for their lives.

If the Infinite Heavenly Palace knew that he had so many Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragments, it was estimated that he would have to pay a huge price to kill him and snatch these fragments.

Soon.

The Dodge Array is completely arranged, and it is a one-time success.

Suddenly, within the Dao Strange Things Array, the eighth sequence of Dao rules seemed to have turned into a world of rules, allowing Ye Tian to swim in it to comprehend.

Immediately, Ye Tian immersed himself in it and comprehended these eighth sequence supreme rules.

This feeling is a bit like the first time I entered the Great Array of the Guiding Dao, and the rules of the Enlightenment Supreme Dao made rapid progress.

However, it was the ninth sequence of supreme path rules that he entered the Great Array of Initiation Dao Formation to comprehend, and what he was now contemplating was the eighth sequence of supreme path rules.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were rapidly improving, and the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragments were also rapidly being consumed.

......

The third-level battlefield of the True Dao Domain.

Ye Tian came to hunt the Dao Void Demon again on this day, he used the Dao Monster to copy his body, sneaked into an area occupied by the Dao Void Demon, and then found a group of Dao Void Demons and started hunting.

Rumble!!!!

In a short period of time, this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons was killed by him, allowing him to gain a lot of wealth and a number of military exploits.

But just as he was about to flee, an aura of terror permeated the territory, blocking the territory.

"Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon!"

The one who came was one of the six supreme Dao void demons, the Ka Ye Void Demon.

The Ka Ye Void Demon has reached the peak of the sixfold Supreme Dao realm, mastering the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules of ninety percent and one, how terrifying his strength is.

Ye Tian didn't need to look at it and knew that he didn't have a glimmer of hope of escaping, so he directly disbanded the copy body.

When the Jiaye Void Demon saw the dissipated Ye Tian, he was immediately furious.

"Damn, it's this Supreme Dao Realm again!"

He recognized Ye Tian, it was the one who had brought a lot of trouble to the Supreme Dao Void Demon before, and every time he wanted to catch it, it was like committing suicide, but then he appeared again.

This strange way of escaping makes it impossible for them to deal with it.

In fact, Ye Tian is a real suicide, but the copy body can be copied again and again, which makes it seem that he has a strange way of escaping.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian killed too many Supreme Dao Void Demons, which greatly eased the pressure on the third-level battlefield and made him famous.

Although he is not a sixfold supreme realm, his role is no less than that of a true sixfold supreme realm.

After all, if the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm participated in the battle, it would be easy to be targeted by the Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and there would be no time to slaughter the weak Supreme Dao Void Demon, and there would not be many Supreme Dao Void Demons killed.

And as Ye Tian's reputation became louder, Wuji Heavenly Palace naturally knew about it.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Bai Ye looked at a piece of information in his hand, as well as Ye Tian's picture.

"This guy really isn't dead!" Bai Ye said coldly.

That Origin Realm is in the battlefield of the True Dao Domain, and now it seems that the six bodies that Ye Tian broke out of at the beginning are all clones, and the body must still be in the Origin Realm, this time it has turned into a battlefield, and this guy will come out, and even join the Taisu Palace.

Moreover, the other party's cultivation has skyrocketed.

At the beginning, it was just the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, but now it has become the Dual Upper Dao Realm.

"This guy is very likely to take the path of the strongest and most powerful, such a demon can't let him grow up!"

Immediately.

He contacted Taisu Palace and asked Taisu Palace to hand over Ye Tian.

However, Taisu Palace replied directly that there was no way, ignoring Bai Ye.

Subsequently.

He went to find the Six Cry Heavenly Venerables of the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

"Six Cry Tianzun, the guy who snatched my Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit is still alive, and now he has joined the Taisu Wei of Taisu Palace. "White leaf reports.

"This kind of little thing, you handle it yourself!"

Liuqi Tianzun said impatiently.

Bai Ye hurriedly said again: "Sixth Cry Tianzun, this guy has now broken through to the Dual Supreme Dao Realm, and it is very likely that it is a Dual Supreme Dao Realm who has taken the path of the Supreme Strongest Dao!"

"Take the road to the strongest!!!

The Six Cry Heavenly Venerable became solemn, if such a demon really grows, it will completely greatly increase the strength of the Taisu Palace, and it is even possible to grow to the combat power of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor in the future!

Of course, not every Knowing Realm of the Supreme Path of the Supreme Path can grow, even if it costs a lot of money to cultivate such a Supreme Dao Realm in the early stage, it may fall into a bottleneck in the later stage, so that it cannot break through, resulting in obscurity.

It is also possible to fall halfway through, and all cultivation will be lost.

Therefore, at present, Liuqi Tianzun did not panic, nor did he pay too much attention to it.

But he didn't want Ye Tian to grow up.

"Taisu Palace won't let people go, right?" asked Liuqi Tianzun.

"Yes!" Hakuba nodded.

The Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable was silent for a while, and then said, "You can go to the battlefield of the True Dao Realm and secretly attack and kill that Supreme Dao Realm. "

"Six Heavenly Venerables, the one that is emerging in the Supreme Dao Realm now is not necessarily the real body, it may still be a clone, if it is to attack and kill the clone, there is no point!"

Bai Ye also thought about assassination, but when he thought that it was just a clone, assassination would be useless, but would make Ye Tian more cautious.

"That's right, the Supreme Dao Realm you mentioned, its ontology may still be hidden in the Origin Realm!" Six Cry Heavenly Venerable also felt that this possibility existed.

And to destroy the Origin Realm, except for the Eightfold Supreme Dao, only the Supreme Dao Void Demon can do it.

But they had no way to order the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and they didn't want to try to talk and cooperate with the Supreme Dao Void Demon, the two sides were mortal enemies, and nothing could be trusted.

If you believe a word, it may cause a large number of clansmen to fall, and no one of the Supreme Dao Void Demons will do this.

"We can only wait for Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor to return, and when the time comes, we will ask Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor to make a move, pay a certain price, and we can kill each other across the Origin Realm!" said Liuqi Tianzun.

As for whether Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor was willing to pay such a price, he thought he was willing.

If it is an ordinary Dao realm, it is definitely not worth paying such a price, but if it is a supreme Dao realm that takes the path of the strongest Dao, Wuji Heavenly Palace is still offended, so it is natural to take advantage of the other party's failure to grow up and kill it.

When Bai Ye heard this, he was immediately overjoyed: "If there is a move from Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor, even if that Ye Tian has more clones, he will be destroyed with the main body!"

"Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor still has very important things, he can't come back in a short time, and it will take at least hundreds of Dao Era time. Six Cry Tianzun said.

Bai Ye felt that the time of hundreds of solstice was not too long, and he was willing to wait.

And Ye Tian didn't know that he was being targeted by the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and he was ready to ask the Wuji Heavenly Emperor to make a move on him.

At this time.

His Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules had skyrocketed significantly, and he had already risen to more than eighty percent of the realm.

At this rate of progress, it may not take too long to raise the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to the ten-percent realm.

However, these Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragments were still not enough, and he still needed to kill more Supreme Dao Strange Objects.

However, there weren't many Dao Strange Things in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and he wanted to go to other strange places to hunt Dao Strange Things.
